identity.name: E1 Beauty - Ethereal Minimalist
identity.core_philosophy: Soft Luxury: Hard contrast typography on soft, breathable backgrounds. No clutter, just essence.

typography.pairing_rules: Use Playfair Display for all emotional headers. Use Manrope for all functional text, UI elements, and long-form content. Ensure high contrast (Deep Charcoal #1A1A1A) for readability.

usage.background: bg-[#FDFCF8] (Warm White) for main pages. bg-white for dashboard cards.
usage.text: text-[#1A1A1A] (Obsidian) for primary text. text-[#6B7280] (Gray-500) for secondary.
usage.accent_highlight: text-[#D4AF37] (Muted Gold) for small accents, icons, or thin lines.

grid_systems.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6

structure_rules: Asymmetry: Use col-span-2 or row-span-2 in bento grids to break monotony.
Breathing Room: Add py-20 or py-32 for section vertical padding.
Dashboard: Sidebar fixed left (w-64), content scrollable right.

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-sm font-medium tracking-wide transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-8 py-6 border border-[#E5E7EB] bg-transparent hover:bg-[#F3F4F6] transition-all

cards.service_card: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white border border-[#E5E7EB] hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300
cards.booking_card: rounded-xl border border-[#E5E7EB] bg-white p-6 shadow-sm
cards.dashboard_stat: rounded-xl border border-[#E5E7EB] bg-white p-6 flex flex-col gap-2

inputs.default: rounded-lg border-[#E5E7EB] bg-[#FDFCF8] px-4 py-3 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#1A1A1A] focus:border-[#1A1A1A] transition-all

navigation.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#FDFCF8]/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[#E5E7EB]/50

visual_enhancers.texture: Use a subtle grain overlay (opacity 0.03) on the main background to avoid digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.03)] for cards. shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] for hovering.
visual_enhancers.border_radius: rounded-2xl for large containers, rounded-lg for inputs/buttons.
visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: Buttons slightly lift on hover. Images have a slow zoom scale-105 on hover.

3d_libraries.recommendation: None needed for this minimalist aesthetic. Focus on high-quality 2D imagery and micro-interactions (Framer Motion).
3d_libraries.optional: React Spring Parallax for smooth scrolling effects on the landing page.

general: Use 'Lenis' for smooth scrolling to give a premium feel.
Implement the 'Bento Grid' for the service gallery.
Ensure the Booking Wizard is step-by-step (Service -> Date/Time -> Info -> Confirm).
The Dashboard must be separate from the marketing site (different layout/sidebar).
Use 'Sonner' for all toast notifications (booking success, errors).
frontend_tech: Use Shadcn UI for interactive components (Calendars, Dialogs, Selects).
Customize Shadcn components to match the rounded-2xl and serif font styles.
Use Tailwind for all layout and spacing.
Do NOT use gradients for text headers. Keep them solid #1A1A1A.
accessibility: Ensure all text meets APCA contrast guidelines (Deep Charcoal on Off-White is safe).
Add aria-labels to all icon-only buttons.
Support keyboard navigation for the booking calendar.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Don't make generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky headers.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
